name: company-valuation-engine
description: Value any company using DCF (multi-stage), DDM (3-stage Gordon), trading comps, LBO, and sum-of-parts. Ratios, sensitivity tables, WACC calculation, and terminal value included. Input financial data or link a ticker.
seo_title: Company Valuation Engine | DCF & Comparables Analysis
seo_description: Multi-method valuation with DCF, comparable company analysis, and precedent transactions.
